jobs.title: Senior Full Stack Developer
jobs.shortDescription: We're looking for an experienced full stack developer to build scalable web applications using modern technologies.
jobs.description: Join our dynamic development team to design, develop, and maintain cutting-edge web applications. You'll work with modern technologies including React, Node.js, and cloud platforms to deliver exceptional solutions for our clients.
responsibilities: Design and develop scalable web applications using modern frameworks
Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features
Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback
Troubleshoot and debug applications to optimize performance
Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends
Mentor junior developers and contribute to team growth
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field
5+ years of experience in full stack development
Proficiency in JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3
Experience with React, Node.js, Express.js
Strong knowledge of database systems (MySQL, MongoDB)
Familiarity with version control systems (Git)
Experience with RESTful APIs and microservices architecture
Understanding of cloud services (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Excellent problem-solving and communication skills
preferredQualifications: Knowledge of DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines
Previous experience in a client-facing role
benefits: Health insurance for you and your family
Flexible working hours and remote work options
Modern equipment and home office setup allowance
Team building events and company retreats

jobs.title: Frontend Developer
jobs.shortDescription: Create beautiful and responsive user interfaces using React and modern CSS frameworks.
jobs.description: We're seeking a talented frontend developer to join our team and create stunning user interfaces. You'll collaborate closely with designers and backend developers to deliver exceptional user experiences across web and mobile platforms.
responsibilities: Develop responsive and interactive user interfaces using React
Translate UI/UX design wireframes into high-quality code
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability
Collaborate with backend developers to integrate APIs
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness
Implement pixel-perfect designs with attention to detail
Participate in code reviews and maintain coding standards
requirements: 2-4 years of frontend development experience
Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript/TypeScript
Experience with React and state management (Redux, Context API)
Familiarity with CSS frameworks (Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS)
Understanding of responsive design principles
Experience with version control (Git)
Knowledge of browser testing and debugging tools
preferredQualifications: Experience with Next.js or other React frameworks
Knowledge of animation libraries (Framer Motion, GSAP)
Familiarity with Figma or Adobe XD
Experience with testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library)

jobs.title: Backend Developer (Node.js)
jobs.shortDescription: Build robust and scalable backend systems using Node.js and modern database technologies.
jobs.description: Join our backend team to architect and develop server-side solutions that power our applications. You'll work with Node.js, databases, and cloud infrastructure to create efficient and secure backend systems.
responsibilities: Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices
Develop and maintain database architectures
Optimize application performance and scalability
Implement security and data protection measures
Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
Collaborate with frontend developers and DevOps team
Monitor and troubleshoot production issues
requirements: 3-5 years of backend development experience
Strong proficiency in Node.js and Express.js
Experience with databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Understanding of API design principles
Knowledge of authentication and authorization mechanisms
Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure)
Experience with Git and CI/CD pipelines

jobs.title: UI/UX Designer
jobs.shortDescription: Design intuitive and engaging user experiences for web and mobile applications.
jobs.description: We're looking for a creative UI/UX designer to craft beautiful and functional designs for our clients' digital products. You'll conduct user research, create wireframes and prototypes, and collaborate with developers to bring designs to life.
responsibilities: Conduct user research and usability testing
Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups
Design user interfaces for web and mobile applications
Develop and maintain design systems and style guides
Collaborate with product managers and developers
Present design concepts to stakeholders
Iterate designs based on user feedback and analytics
requirements: 3-5 years of UI/UX design experience
Proficiency in Figma, Adobe Creative Suite
Strong portfolio demonstrating user-centered design
Understanding of design principles and best practices
Experience with responsive design
Knowledge of HTML/CSS fundamentals
Excellent communication and presentation skills
preferredQualifications: Experience with motion design and animation

jobs.title: Graphic Designer
jobs.shortDescription: Create visually compelling graphics for digital marketing, branding, and web projects.
jobs.description: Join our creative team to design engaging visual content for various digital platforms. You'll work on branding, marketing materials, social media graphics, and web assets that help our clients stand out.
responsibilities: Design marketing collateral and digital assets
Create social media graphics and advertisements
Develop branding materials and style guides
Design web banners, infographics, and presentations
Collaborate with marketing and web teams
Maintain brand consistency across all materials
Stay current with design trends and best practices
requirements: 2-3 years of graphic design experience
Expert in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign
Strong portfolio showcasing diverse design work
Understanding of typography and color theory
Ability to work on multiple projects simultaneously
Attention to detail and creativity
Good communication skills
preferredQualifications: Experience with video editing (Premiere Pro, After Effects)
Experience with Canva or similar tools

jobs.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
jobs.shortDescription: Drive online marketing campaigns and optimize digital presence for B2B and B2C clients.
jobs.description: We're seeking a data-driven digital marketing specialist to plan, execute, and optimize online marketing campaigns. You'll work with SEO, PPC, email marketing, and social media to drive growth for our clients.
responsibilities: Develop and execute digital marketing strategies
Manage PPC campaigns across Google, Facebook, and LinkedIn
Optimize websites for search engines (SEO)
Create and manage email marketing campaigns
Analyze campaign performance and provide insights
Manage social media accounts and content calendars
Stay updated with digital marketing trends and algorithm changes
requirements: 3-4 years of digital marketing experience
Proficiency in Google Analytics and Google Ads
Experience with SEO tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz)
Knowledge of social media advertising platforms
Understanding of email marketing platforms (Mailchimp, SendGrid)
Strong analytical and reporting skills
Excellent copywriting abilities
preferredQualifications: Familiarity with HTML and basic web development

jobs.title: SEO Specialist
jobs.shortDescription: Improve website rankings and organic traffic through strategic SEO implementations.
jobs.description: Join our team as an SEO specialist to optimize websites and content for search engines. You'll conduct audits, implement on-page and off-page SEO strategies, and track performance metrics to drive organic growth.
responsibilities: Conduct comprehensive SEO audits of websites
Implement on-page optimization strategies
Develop and execute link building campaigns
Perform keyword research and competitive analysis
Monitor and report on SEO performance metrics
Collaborate with content and development teams
Stay updated with Google algorithm updates
requirements: 2-3 years of hands-on SEO experience
Proficiency with SEO tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog)
Strong understanding of Google Analytics and Search Console
Knowledge of technical SEO principles
Experience with keyword research and content optimization
Understanding of HTML and website structure
Analytical mindset with attention to detail
preferredQualifications: Google Analytics and Search Console certifications
Basic understanding of JavaScript and rendering

jobs.title: Project Manager
jobs.shortDescription: Lead and manage software development projects from inception to delivery.
jobs.description: We're looking for an experienced project manager to oversee multiple software development projects. You'll coordinate teams, manage client relationships, ensure timely delivery, and maintain high quality standards.
responsibilities: Plan, execute, and close software development projects
Define project scope, goals, and deliverables
Coordinate cross-functional teams and allocate resources
Manage project timelines, budgets, and risks
Communicate with clients and stakeholders regularly
Conduct sprint planning and retrospectives
Ensure quality standards and best practices are followed
requirements: 5+ years of project management experience in software development
Strong knowledge of Agile/Scrum methodologies
Experience with project management tools (Jira, Asana, Trello)
Excellent leadership and communication skills
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously
Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities
Client-facing experience
preferredQualifications: Experience in client services or consulting

jobs.title: Mobile App Developer (React Native)
jobs.shortDescription: Build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native for iOS and Android.
jobs.description: Join our mobile development team to create high-performance cross-platform mobile applications. You'll work with React Native to deliver seamless experiences on both iOS and Android platforms.
responsibilities: Develop cross-platform mobile applications using React Native
Integrate with backend APIs and third-party services
Optimize app performance and troubleshoot issues
Implement mobile UI/UX designs with pixel-perfect accuracy
Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code
Publish apps to Apple App Store and Google Play Store
Stay updated with mobile development trends and best practices
requirements: 3-5 years of mobile app development experience
Strong proficiency in React Native
Experience with iOS and Android platforms
Knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript
Understanding of mobile app architecture patterns
Experience with RESTful APIs and GraphQL
Familiarity with app deployment processes
preferredQualifications: Experience with native iOS (Swift) or Android (Kotlin) development
Knowledge of mobile app analytics tools
Experience with push notifications and deep linking
Familiarity with CI/CD for mobile apps
Published apps on App Store or Play Store

jobs.title: Social Media Manager
jobs.shortDescription: Manage and grow social media presence for diverse clients across multiple platforms.
jobs.description: We're seeking a creative and analytical social media manager to develop and execute social media strategies for our clients. You'll create engaging content, manage communities, and drive brand growth across platforms.
responsibilities: Develop and implement social media strategies
Create engaging content for various social platforms
Manage and schedule posts across social media channels
Monitor social media trends and competitor activities
Engage with followers and manage online communities
Analyze social media metrics and prepare reports
Coordinate with design and content teams
requirements: 2-4 years of social media management experience
Proficiency with social media management tools (Hootsuite, Buffer)
Strong understanding of major social platforms
Excellent copywriting and content creation skills
Knowledge of social media advertising
Analytical skills to interpret metrics
Creative mindset with attention to detail
preferredQualifications: Knowledge of social media analytics tools
benefits: Social media tools and platforms access
